MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties, LLC is presented. Represented by Donna Stern.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Yariksa Arteaga and Luz Zirate are present. Vilma Rueda IS NOT present.
Attorney Brian Schlinkert representing the defendants through limited scope.

Counsels and litigants confer in hallway.

This case settled. Counsel for plaintiff requests that the matter remain on the trial calendar as he needs to get a signature from defendant Rueda who was not present at settlement.
The trial date of JAN-28-2013 remains.
